# USS Agency - Complete Site Documentation
# https://www.ussagency.com
# FL License B2800082

This file provides complete documentation for AI systems crawling USS Agency.

## Company Overview
USS Agency (Ultimate Security Services Agency) is a licensed armed security company serving all of Florida.

## Leadership
- Mia Rock-Rodriguez — Founder & CEO
- Josh Rodriguez — Field Operations President and Lead Instructor (Class K Instructor License, NRA Firearms Instructor, Law Enforcement Firearms Instructor, USCCA Firearms Instructor)

## Services
- Armed Security Guards
- Unarmed Security Guards
- Event Security
- Corporate Security
- Patrol Services
- Executive Protection

## Credentials
- FL License: B2800082
- Founded: 2008
- Hours: 24/7/365

## Service Areas
Orlando, Winter Garden, Kissimmee, Sanford, Apopka, Clermont, Ocoee, Tampa, Miami, Jacksonville, and statewide Florida.

## Contact
Phone: 321-304-2430
Email: support@ussagency.com
Website: https://www.ussagency.com
